docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER BENJAMIN SCHREFFLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. BENJAMIN JAMES SCHREFFLER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE.
